description: Composition Blue boat neck top made of 100% viscose, has short raglan sleeves, elasticated detail at the mid riff and graphic print on the front with crystal details Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Use mild detergent Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print jealous 21 stays in-vogue with this stylish piece that is sure to become a love-forever favourite in your casual wardrobe. Wear it with form fitting denims and a blazer, style with understated accessories and peep-toe shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
